nodes.name: 山齒鶉
nodes.summary: 山齒鶉（Northern bobwhite，学名 Colinus virginianus），分类上属于鸡形目，并归入齿鹑科，在图谱中标记为近危（NT）物种，主要分布于阿巴拉契亚山脉、伊斯帕尼奥拉岛，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏。

nodes.name: NT
nodes.summary: NT表示 IUCN 近危等级，当前关联914种鸟类，如帝企鹅、小斑几维鸟、大美洲鸵等914种鸟类。

nodes.name: 阿巴拉契亚山脉
nodes.summary: 阿巴拉契亚山脉是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联4种鸟类，包括蓝翅鸭、山齒鶉、黑顶山雀等4种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 齿鹑科
nodes.summary: 齿鹑科（Odontophoridae）是图谱中的科级分类节点，当前关联34种鸟类，如Stone partridge、茶臉鶉、山翎鹑等34种鸟类。

nodes.name: 伊斯帕尼奥拉岛
nodes.summary: 伊斯帕尼奥拉岛是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联14种鸟类，包括山齒鶉、美洲紅鸛、White-crowned pigeon等14种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: 鸡形目
nodes.summary: 鸡形目（Galliformes）是图谱中的目级分类节点，当前关联298种鸟类，如眼斑冢雉、Red-billed brushturkey、Black-billed brushturkey等298种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is absent from the southern tip of Florida (where the extinct Key West bobwhite subspecies once lived) and the highest elevations of the Appalachian Mountains, but occurs in eastern Mexico and in Cuba, and has been introduced to Hispaniola (both the Dominican Republic and Haiti), the Bahamas, the Turks and Caicos Islands, the U.S

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is absent from the southern tip of Florida (where the extinct Key West bobwhite subspecies once lived) and the highest elevations of the Appalachian Mountains, but occurs in eastern Mexico and in Cuba, and has been introduced to Hispaniola (both the Dominican Republic and Haiti), the Bahamas, the Turks and Caicos Islands, the U.S

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Habitat degradation has contributed to the northern bobwhite population in eastern North America declining by roughly 85% from 1966 to 2014. This population decline is apparently range-wide and continuing. There are 20 subspecies of northern bobwhite, many of which are hunted extensively as game birds
